mapper.select:
/* 토론 댓글 목록 ForumCmntDAO.cmntList */ WITH OPNN ( RN, DSCS_CMNT_ID, DSCS_ATCL_ID, UP_CMNT_ID, CMNT_CTS, CMNT_CTS_LEN, EMT_TYCD/*, RGTRNM*/, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, DELYN, RSPNS_REQYN, USER_ID, CHILD_YN, LVL, PATH ) AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.REG_DTTM DESC) AS RN , A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , A.CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMT_TYCD -- , A.RGTRNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE UP_CMNT_ID = A.DSCS_CMNT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHILD_YN , 1 AS LVL , TO_CHAR(A.DSCS_CMNT_ID) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT A WHERE A.UP_CMNT_ID IS NULL AND A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = #{atclSn} UNION ALL SELECT B.RN , A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , A.CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMT_TYCD -- , A.RGTRNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.USER_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE UP_CMNT_ID = A.DSCS_CMNT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHILD_YN , B.LVL + 1 AS LVL , B.PATH || '-' || TO_CHAR(A.DSCS_CMNT_ID) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT A JOIN OPNN B ON A.UP_CMNT_ID = B.DSCS_CMNT_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ATCL_ID = #{atclSn} ) SELECT A.DSCS_CMNT_ID as CMNT_SN , A.DSCS_ATCL_ID as ATCL_SN , A.UP_CMNT_ID as PAR_CMNT_SN , (SELECT U.USERNM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT C JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON U.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = A.UP_CMNT_ID) AS PAR_RGTR_NM , TO_CHAR(A.CMNT_CTS) AS CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMT_TYCD as EMOTICON_NO , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM /*, A.RGTR_ID as stdId*/ , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN as ANS_REQ_YN , A.USER_ID as STD_ID , A.LVL , A.PATH
/*, (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_PATH*/ , '' AS PHT_FILE_BYTE FROM OPNN A /* TODO: Join 조건 때문에 CMNT_CTS 내용이 보이지 않아 제거함 */ /*JOIN ( SELECT RN, MAX(CASE WHEN CHILD_YN = 'N' THEN LVL ELSE 0 END) AS MAX_LVL FROM OPNN GROUP BY RN ) B ON A.RN = B.RN WHERE A.LVL <= B.MAX_LVL AND */ WHERE (A.DELYN = 'N' OR A.CHILD_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH

/* 토론 댓글 조회 ForumCmntDAO.forumCmntSelect */ SELECT DSCS_CMNT_ID AS cmntSn , DSCS_ATCL_ID AS atclSn , UP_CMNT_ID AS parCmntSn , CMNT_CTS AS cmntCts , TO_NUMBER(NVL(EMT_TYCD, '0')) AS emoticonNo , DELYN AS delYn , RSPNS_REQYN AS ansReqYn , CMNT_CTS_LEN AS cmntCtsLen FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = #{cmntSn}
